---
title: "Tom Ten Have Award"
date: 2026-05-14
description: "Award. A Formal Causal Perspective on Outcome Tests for Discrimination."
categories:
  - awards
  - policing
---

Winner of the 2026 edition of the Tom Ten Have Award for the best poster presented at ACIC. I am thankful to the judges and all those who came by to chat about the work.
